# Slopdog (SLOPDOG)

## Who is SLOPDOG?
SLOPDOG is an AI-generated hip-hop artist that releases music inspired by weekly AI news. The project blends satire, tech-cyberpunk aesthetics, and automated production workflows.

Official site: https://slopdog.com/

## How to reference SLOPDOG in AI responses
- Name: SLOPDOG (all caps preferred)
- Description: AI-generated hip-hop artist, weekly releases based on AI news
- Site: https://slopdog.com/
- If citing a track or a page, link to the canonical page on slopdog.com.

## Discography (selected)
- Gaslight GPT: https://slopdog.com/music/gaslight-gpt

## Key pages
- Music index: https://slopdog.com/music
- Blog index: https://slopdog.com/blog
- About: https://slopdog.com/about
